form.formComment: Comes here off a 60-day let-up. Most recently 12th of 14 at Flemington Bm78 on February 14 over 2000m, 7 len behind Tarvue with 56.5kg at $21. The run before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Pakenham Bm70 on January 29 over 1600m, long-neck behind Mometz carrying 60.5kg at $3.50. Very well placed this level and back in trip.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 5th of 11 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Damas carrying 61.5kg at $31. Second-up came home strongly from last on the turn and won by 0.8 len at Stawell Bm62 April 5 over 1600m defeating It's All Calm carrying 61kg at $11. Risking this one.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months eased back early on 6th of 11 at Geelong 0 - 66 on April 1 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Sussex Duchess carrying 60kg at $101. Previously second-up second last of 7 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 on November 14 over 1900m, 6 len behind Chateaux Park carrying 60kg at $6. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.
